title: Sysmon Suspicious Outbound Connection from LOLBin
description: Detects outbound network connections from Living-off-the-Land binaries (LOLBins) to external IP addresses. These binaries are commonly abused by attackers for downloading payloads and establishing C2.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Process Name' like '*\certutil.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\bitsadmin.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\mshta.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\regsvr32.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\rundll32.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\wscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\cscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\msiexec.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\installutil.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\msdt.exe') and Initiated = 'true') and not (('Destination IP' like '10.*' or 'Destination IP' like '172.16.*' or 'Destination IP' like '192.168.*' or 'Destination IP' like '127.*')))
falsepositives: Legitimate use of certutil for certificate operations
